summary: Iteration 6 fully verified. Backend: 12/12 pytest pass in /app/backend/tests/test_pillbox_iter6.py covering GET /api/gallery (public list, desc order), POST /api/admin/gallery (401 no token, 400 bad/empty data URL, 413 >5MB after base64 decode, 200 with id+image_data+caption+source='admin'+created_at), DELETE /api/admin/gallery/{id} (401, 404, 200 removes), DELETE /api/admin/applications/{id} (401, 404, 200 removes). Webhook fire-and-forget confirmed by 200 response despite Discord upload happening in background. Frontend (Playwright on preview URL): Navbar has [data-testid=nav-gallery] and NO nav-idcard. Home has no 'ID Generator' CTA. /gallery renders [data-testid=gallery-page] with [data-testid=gallery-empty] when empty. /idcard with no localStorage token shows [data-testid=admin-gate]; wrong token keeps gate visible (toast); correct token unlocks and [data-testid=id-card-preview] renders with 'TEAM PILLBOX' (no 'PILLBOX EMS') — photo box uses Tailwind h-[170px] fixed height, barcode block is flow-positioned (relative, mt-4) AFTER the data grid so no overlap. /admin Applications tab (testid=tab-apps) shows [data-testid=delete-app-{8char}] per card; clicking + confirm removes the card. /admin Gallery tab (testid=tab-gallery) shows upload form (gallery-file-input, gallery-caption-input, gallery-uploadedby-input, gallery-upload-btn) + preview pane + [data-testid=gallery-admin-grid] of items each with [data-testid=gallery-delete-{8char}]. Public /gallery lightbox opens on item click and closes via [data-testid=lightbox-close]. All seeded TEST_ data cleaned up.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: MAX_GALLERY_BYTES = 5*1024*1024 enforced via len(base64.b64decode(...)) — correct binary-size check, not base64 char length.
server.py: send_gallery_webhook is fired via asyncio.create_task and runs in executor; failures are logged but never propagate — request returns 200 even if Discord is unreachable. Verified.
server.py: DATA_URL_RE is a strict ^data:(image/...);base64,(.+)$ regex; rejects non-image MIME and missing base64 marker. Good defensive parsing.
server.py: GalleryItem has model_config extra='ignore' so unexpected client fields are dropped silently — consistent with StaffMember.
server.py: DELETE /api/admin/applications/{id} and /api/admin/gallery/{id} both gated by require_admin and return 404 when nothing matched — symmetric to /admin/staff.

AdminPage.jsx is now ~900 lines covering Staff + Applications + Gallery managers — approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling. Recommend extracting ApplicationsManager and GalleryManager into separate files in a future cleanup pass.
IdCard.jsx: photo container uses Tailwind h-[170px] (correct) and barcode is in document flow (no `absolute` class) — no z-index war with the data grid.
AdminGate.jsx reuses localStorage key 'pillbox_admin_token' — confirmed shared between /idcard and /admin sessions (logging in via /idcard auto-unlocks /admin and vice-versa).
Gallery admin grid re-fetches on tab mount (Gallery tab is conditionally rendered) — items uploaded externally appear after switching tabs, verified.
test_credentials: ADMIN_TOKEN=pillbox-admin-2026 (X-Admin-Token header / localStorage key 'pillbox_admin_token'). Sourced from /app/memory/test_credentials.md.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_iter6 records (application + gallery items) created during testing were deleted at the end of each test. Final DB state unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter6 file is /app/backend/tests/test_pillbox_iter6.py. Frontend tab testid for Applications is 'tab-apps' (NOT 'tab-applications'). Admin gallery list refreshes on tab mount, so when seeding via API mid-session, switch away from the Gallery tab and back to see new items. AdminGate.jsx + /admin LoginPanel share localStorage key 'pillbox_admin_token'. DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL is configured and the gallery POST actually uploads to Discord — backend treats this as fire-and-forget so the API response is unaffected. Public /gallery item testids use prefix 'gallery-item-' and lightbox is 'gallery-lightbox' with close button 'lightbox-close'.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All iteration-6 acceptance criteria satisfied across backend pytest and Playwright UI checks.
